objective_statement: Understand the security concepts of information assurance (CIA triad)
Understand the ISC2 Code of Ethics
Understand governance processes (policies standards procedures regulations)

domain_name: Business Continuity Disaster Recovery and Incident Response
objective_statement: Understand business continuity (BC) concepts and importance

domain_name: Business Continuity Disaster Recovery and Incident Response
Business Continuity Disaster Recovery and Incident Response
objective_statement: Understand incident response concepts (identification containment eradication recovery lessons learned)
Understand physical access controls (locks badge systems guards mantraps)
Understand logical access controls (ACLs RBAC DAC MAC MFA)
Understand computer networking (OSI TCP/IP topologies protocols)
Understand network threats and attacks (DoS MitM spoofing)
Understand network security infrastructure (firewalls IDS/IPS VPN DMZ)
Understand data security concepts (encryption at rest in transit data classification)
Understand system hardening (patch management configuration baselines)
Understand best practice security policies (acceptable use password change management)
